Merseyside Fight
Game Community

Liverpool's home for fighting game players. Whether you're a seasoned competitor or just picking up a stick for the first time, you belong here. Come through, level up, and be part of something real.

Events

Weeklies, Monthlies
& Majors

We run regular sessions, tournaments, and community nights across Merseyside. Check our schedule to find the next event near you — from casual locals to full-bracket competitions.

Get Involved
Community

All Games.
All Skill Levels.

From Street Fighter and Tekken to Guilty Gear, Marvel, and beyond — MFGC is a place for every corner of the FGC. No gatekeeping. Just good comp, good vibes, and good people.

Say Hello
Get In Touch

Come Find Us

Want to know more, collaborate, or just show up? Drop us a message and we'll get back to you. You can also find us on Discord, Twitter, and at local venues across Merseyside.
